summary: Iteration 46 - Sidebar Navigation Redesign with Framer Motion Testing Complete. All features verified: 5 navigation groups (Monitoraggio, Operazioni, Infrastruttura, Sicurezza, Sistema), collapsible groups with smooth animations, active state with blue (#007AFF) 2px left border indicator, icon opacity transitions, alert badge with count display, user menu with logout, and all data-testid attributes present.

collapsible_animations: Collapse animation works on Monitoraggio group
Expand animation works on Monitoraggio group
Framer Motion AnimatePresence used for smooth height transitions
active_state_styling: Blue left border indicator: backgroundColor='rgb(0, 122, 255)' (#007AFF), width='2px'
alert_badge: Alert badge visible on Alert nav item (data-testid='nav-badge-alert')
Badge pulse animation CSS defined for counts > 10
navigation_functionality: Alerts nav item becomes active after navigation
Security Dashboard accessible from Sicurezza group
Sidebar state persists across page navigation

critical_code_review_comments: Framer Motion properly integrated with AnimatePresence and motion.div for collapsible groups
Active state uses #007AFF blue with 2px left border indicator as specified
Icon opacity transitions implemented via CSS (.nav-icon opacity: 0.6 → 1 on active)
Badge pulse animation defined with @keyframes badgePulse for alerts > 10
Auto-open of group containing active page implemented via useEffect on location.pathname
All data-testid attributes follow consistent naming pattern for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified the sidebar navigation redesign with Framer Motion. All 5 navigation groups (Monitoraggio, Operazioni, Infrastruttura, Sicurezza, Sistema) are present with collapsible functionality. Active state shows blue (#007AFF) 2px left border and blue icon color. Alert badge displays count (currently 8). User menu with logout works. All data-testid attributes present. Note: Badge pulse animation only triggers when count > 10. Some backend 500 errors observed on dashboard API calls but these are pre-existing issues unrelated to sidebar redesign.

notes.framer_motion: Framer Motion is used for collapse/expand animations via AnimatePresence and motion.div with height animation variants
notes.active_state_css: .nav-item.active::before creates the 2px blue left border indicator
notes.badge_pulse_threshold: Badge pulse animation (nav-badge-pulse class) only applies when alertCount > 10
notes.console_warnings: Chart dimension warnings and WebSocket connection issues observed but unrelated to sidebar implementation
